01 — profile

About

Detail-oriented and tech-savvy Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience in web design, UI/UX, and frontend development — complemented by a strong background in data entry, record management, and administrative support.

Skilled in designing user-friendly interfaces and translating ideas into clean, functional layouts. Highly organized and self-motivated, with strong time management and communication skills suited for remote collaboration.

Currently completing a BS in Computer Science at Bicol University, with real-world experience building frontend systems during on-the-job training and freelance-style academic projects.

02 — selected work

Projects

// 01 — featured

IRO Monitoring System

Frontend for an internal monitoring and record-tracking system built for Bicol University's International Relations Office. Includes a dashboard with document logbooks, mobility tracking, and travel requests, plus a full light/dark theme toggle. Designed for daily use by non-technical office staff during live operations.

RoleUI Design · Frontend Development
Stack
HTMLCSSJavaScriptNode.js

// 02 — featured

Barrameda Boarding House — Web Database System

Web-based database system for managing boarding house records — tenant details, room availability, and payment tracking. Includes billing entry, payment status lookup, and a retrieval search, replacing manual logbooks with a structured, queryable interface.

RoleUI Design · Frontend Development
Stack
HTMLCSSJavaScriptPHPMySQL
View on GitHub
// 03 — featured

Movie Database System

CRUD-driven movie catalog with genre browsing (horror, animation, and more), an A–Z index, a ratings-sorted view, and a live search bar. Each title opens into a detail page with trailer, cast, director, runtime, and synopsis. UI built for fast scanning across large datasets.

RoleUI Design · Frontend Development
Stack
HTMLCSSJavaScriptMySQL
View on GitHub
// 04 — featured

The Road Not Taken — Robert Frost Analysis

Interactive analysis site built around an illustrated forest scene with a folded-paper navigation menu — 7 sections covering Frost's biography, historical context, school of thought, poem excerpt, and a full literary merits breakdown, each opening in a styled modal with carousel and grid layouts.

RoleUI Design · Frontend Development

HTMLCSSJavaScript
